question.string: After whom is the Riemannian geometry named?

query.sparql: SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?spouse) / COUNT(DISTINCT ?headOfState)) AS (?averageSpouses) WHERE { ?headOfState wdt:P31 wd:Q21514624 . ?headOfState wdt:P26 ?spouse . }

question.string: Find all Turkish verbs ending with “uş” with their lemma.
From which country are the beagles originally from?
From which country came the 2nd most winners of the Emmy Award ?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?country (COUNT(?winner) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?winner wdt:P166 wd:Q66716595 .
  ?winner wdt:P27 ?country .
}
GROUP BY ?country
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 2
OFFSET 1

question.string: has life expectancy in iran grown in any year after 1999?
has population of Isfahan increased at any point after 2006?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?population ?year WHERE {
  wd:Q118867 wdt:P1082 ?population .
  FILTER (?population > 0) .
  ?item wdt:P580 ?year .
  FILTER (?year > 2006) .
  ?item wdt:P361 wd:Q118867 .
}

  ?kobeAward wdt:P6262 ?year .

}

question.string: How many literary works did Richard Bachman write?
How many notable works does Sarah J. Maas have?
Did Bryan Evenson work for at least one university where he was educated at?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?university ?educatedAt
WHERE {
  BIND(wd:Q17354373 AS ?bryanEvenson)
  ?bryanEvenson wdt:P69 ?educatedAt .
  ?bryanEvenson wdt:P108 ?university .
  FILTER (?university = ?educatedAt)
}

question.string: How many countries have a democracy index higher than 7 and drive on the left side ?

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?country) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?country wdt:P31 wd:Q6256 .
  ?country wdt:P2263 ?democracyIndex .
  FILTER (?democracyIndex > 7) .
  ?country wdt:P1687 wd:Q14242 .
}

question.string: How many countries have never been members of the UN?

query.sparql: SELECT (COUNT(?country) as ?count) WHERE { ?country wdt:P31 wd:Q6256 . FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?country wdt:P1128 wd:Q1065 } }

question.string: How many countries have mountains whose peaks are higher than 2000m above sea level?

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?country) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?mountain wdt:P31 wd:Q8502 .
  ?mountain wdt:P2044 ?elevation .
  FILTER (?elevation > 2000) .
  ?mountain wdt:P4552 ?mountain_range .
  ?mountain_range wdt:P361 ?country .
  ?country wdt:P31 wd:Q6256 .
}

WHERE {

  ?work wdt:P161 ?dragon .
  ?work wdt:P31 wd:Q7884724 .
  ?work wdt:P162 "Game of Thrones"@en .
}

question.string: How many Oscars did all the movies directed by Hayao Miyazaki combined win?
How many paintings of Pablo Picasso were ever in a museum?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?painting (COUNT(?museum) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?painting wdt:P106 wd:Q3305213 .
  ?painting wdt:P800 wd:Q5593 .
  ?painting wdt:P608 ?exhibition .
  ?exhibition wdt:P279* wd:Q838948 .

} GROUP BY ?painting

question.string: How many people died due to the Great Leap Forward according to the highest estimate?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?item ?itemLabel (MAX(?numberOfDeaths) AS ?maxDeaths)
WHERE
{
  ?item wdt:P31 wd:Q17524420 .
  ?item wdt:P1705 ?numberOfDeaths .
}
GROUP BY ?item ?itemLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?maxDeaths)
LIMIT 1

question.string: How many people have won the Nobel Prize in Literature since its inception?

question.string: How many people live in cities in the vicinity of the Nile ?
How many pitch classes are part of the chromatic scale?

query.sparql: SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?pitch) AS (?count)) WHERE { ?pitch wdt:P527 wd:Q202021 }

question.string: how many plays has William Shakespeare written in the 16th century.

query.sparql:
SELECT ?work (COUNT(?work) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?work wdt:P50 wd:Q692 .
  ?work wdt:P577 ?date .
  FILTER(YEAR(?date) >= 1501 && YEAR(?date) <= 1600) .
  ?work wdt:P31 wd:Q839955 .
}
GROUP BY ?work
